channel.title: Nicotine Science and Policy
channel.description: Daily digest of views, debates and discussions on nicotine science, policy, regulation and advocacy.

item.title: WHO hit with community fact check after calling for flavoured vape bans
item.description: WHO Director-General Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus called for global action against tobacco and nicotine companies, citing high youth usage rates. Despite a fact check dispute on the impact of vaping on youth, the WHO advocates for banning flavored vaping products, regulating advertising, and controlling packaging to combat addiction. (Published on June 08, 2026byjunonews.com)
